title: achillea millefolium var. setacea
intro: Achillea millefolium var. setacea, also known as Yarrow Setaceous or Western Yarrow, is a variation of the yarrow plant species that is native to North America. It has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Achillea millefolium var. setacea include its ability to support digestive health, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural diuretic, while also being used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. Achillea millefolium var. setacea can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
